title: Travis
html:
Travis

Recurring confidant in Yahir's Grants Pass era — the back-channel adult during family conflict and the "thank-you / resolution" relational mode. Spans 2018 (earliest mention) through 2023 (still being asked questions). Most likely a teacher, mentor, or community-org adult outside the household — the conflict-mediation use confirms he's a trusted-third-party in Yahir's adolescent ecosystem.

Relational role

Travis appears across three recurring modes:

  1. Conflict back-channel — "Tell him that I talked to Travis" (2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it) — used as proof-of-witness during family escalation
  2. Gratitude / resolution — "do Travis's thank you, resolution" (2019 09 30 show dad all of the documents) — written into the debt of gratitude log
  3. Question-target / mentor — 2023 10 26 questions for trav is a full prepared-question list, four years after the original conflict — Travis is still on Yahir's "people to brain-pick" list well into the OSU era

The "thank you" framing + the mediation use suggests teacher-tier authority outside the home. Likely overlaps with the Boys & Girls Club or church orbit.

Chronology

  • 2018-07-28 — 2018 07 28 542638062 — earliest mention (sophomore-era)
  • 2019-09-25 — 2019 09 25 feeding illusion or ending it — conflict back-channel use
  • 2019-09-28 — 2019 09 28 gtanos craigslist — same-week tangential
  • 2019-09-30 — 2019 09 30 show dad all of the documents — "do Travis's thank you, resolution"
  • 2019-10-08 — 2019 10 08 chinese practice — "talking with Travis and Sr. Manuel"
  • 2020-01-15 — 2020 01 15 Untitled document — early-2020 mention
  • 2020-03-22 — 2020 03 22 stock watchlist march — adjacent context
  • 2020-03-30 — 2020 03 30 facebook — pandemic-onset mention
  • 2023-10-26 — 2023 10 26 questions for trav — prepared question list, OSU-era

Connections

grants pass teen era · boys and girls club · brenda aguilera · yahir family · debt of gratitude
